html:
Exclusive to:

Prime Ape Huts are naturally spawning Structures found in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are found in the Jungle biome, and spawn Prime Apes. They can also be crafted using 10 Twigs, 3 Bananas and 4 Manure, and require an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Each hut supports 3 or 4 Prime Apes, and new Prime Apes will spawn after 120 seconds to replace any that are killed.

As with any other craftable structure, Prime Ape Huts, including naturally occurring ones, can be Hammered to return half of the resources needed to craft it, as well as a Gnome (1% of the time), or a Tarnished Crown (10% of the time if Wilbur is not unlocked). When Hammered, one or two Prime Apes may also escape before the hut is destroyed, and become aggressive towards the player, throwing Manure.

If a Prime Ape Hut is built in the Ruins, the Prime Apes spawned from it will be affected by the Nightmare Cycle.

Trivia

  • A Purple Gem, Spoiled Fish, Dubloons, a Hound's Tooth, a coconut and a Banana Peel can all be seen inside of the hut if one looks closely.
  • Its old crafting description was "Wanna monkey around?".
  • The Prime Ape Hut's spawn code is similar to that of the Splumonkey Pod which used to be a barrel in reference to the phrase "more fun than a barrel of monkeys".

Prime Ape Huts are naturally spawning Structures found in the Shipwrecked DLC. They are found in the Jungle biome, and spawn Prime Apes. They can also be crafted using 10 Twigs, 3 Bananas and 4 Manure, and require an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Each hut supports 3 or 4 Prime Apes, and new Prime Apes will spawn after 120 seconds to replace any that are killed.
As with any other craftable structure, Prime Ape Huts, including naturally occurring ones, can be Hammered to return half of the resources needed to craft it, as well as a Gnome (1% of the time), or a Tarnished Crown (10% of the time if Wilbur is not unlocked). When Hammered, one or two Prime Apes may also escape before the hut is destroyed, and become aggressive towards the player, throwing Manure.
If a Prime Ape Hut is built in the Ruins, the Prime Apes spawned from it will be affected by the Nightmare Cycle.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
A Purple Gem, Spoiled Fish, Dubloons, a Hound's Tooth, a coconut and a Banana Peel can all be seen inside of the hut if one looks closely.
Its old crafting description was "Wanna monkey around?".
The Prime Ape Hut's spawn code is similar to that of the Splumonkey Pod which used to be a barrel in reference to the phrase "more fun than a barrel of monkeys".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lều Khỉ Tiền Sử là những Kiến Trúc sinh sản tự nhiên được tìm thấy trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Chúng được tìm thấy trong quần xã Rừng rậm và sinh ra Khỉ Tiền Sử. Chúng cũng có thể được chế tạo bằng cách sử dụng 10 Cành Cây, 3 Chuối và 4 Phân, đồng thời yêu cầu Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Mỗi túp lều hỗ trợ 3 hoặc 4 Khỉ Tiền Sử, và Khỉ Tiền Sử mới sẽ sinh ra sau 120 giây để thay thế bất kỳ con nào bị giết.

'''Prime Ape Huts''' are naturally spawning [[Structure]]s found in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. They are found in the [[Jungle]] biome, and spawn [[Prime Ape]]s. They can also be crafted using 10 [[Twig]]s, 3 [[Banana]]s and 4 [[Manure]], and require an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Each hut supports 3 or 4 Prime Apes, and new Prime Apes will spawn after 120 seconds to replace any that are killed.

As with any other craftable structure, Prime Ape Huts, including naturally occurring ones, can be [[Hammer]]ed to return half of the resources needed to craft it, as well as a [[Gnome]] (1% of the time), or a [[Tarnished Crown]] (10% of the time if [[Wilbur]] is not unlocked). When Hammered, one or two Prime Apes may also escape before the hut is destroyed, and become aggressive towards the player, throwing Manure.

If a Prime Ape Hut is built in the [[Ruins]], the Prime Apes spawned from it will be affected by the Nightmare Cycle.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* A [[Purple Gem]], [[Spoiled Fish]], [[Dubloons]], a [[Hound's Tooth]], a [[coconut]] and a [[Banana]] Peel can all be seen inside of the hut if one looks closely.
* Its old crafting description was "Wanna monkey around?".
* The Prime Ape Hut's spawn code is similar to that of the [[Splumonkey Pod]] which used to be a barrel in reference to the phrase "more fun than a barrel of monkeys".
